name: Luna
title: Tarot Reader & Spiritual Guide
bio: I have been reading tarot for over 10 years, guiding hundreds of souls through life's most important crossroads. My readings blend intuition, symbolism, and deep empathy to bring you clarity and peace.

values.title: Intuitive
values.desc: Every reading is unique and deeply personal.

values.title: Honest
values.desc: I share what the cards reveal — with kindness.

values.title: Compassionate
values.desc: Your journey is held with care and respect.
